simple_types.name: JMP_Condition
simple_types.code:
type JMP_Condition is
   (Always,
    Scratch_X_Zero,
    Scratch_X_Nonzero_Decrement,
    Scratch_Y_Zero,
    Scratch_Y_Nonzero_Decrement,
    X_Notequal_Y,
    Input_Pin,
    OSRE_Not_Empty)
with Size => 3;
